fake_mcp.name: fake-den-mcp
fake_mcp.safety: Generated fixture only; handlers must not contact the real Den server.

tools.name: mcp_den_abort_worker_run
tools.description: Request cancellation of a tracked Den worker run by marking its durable assignment aborted. Core does not terminate external runtime processes.

run_id.description: Worker run id, or session id as fallback.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_add_agent_guidance_entry
tools.description: Add or update a first-class agent guidance entry that points at an existing Den document.

project_id.description: Guidance scope project or space ID. Use '_global' for guidance inherited by all projects and spaces.

document_slug.description: Document slug to include in resolved guidance.

document_project_id.description: Project ID where the referenced document lives. Defaults to project_id.

importance.description: Importance: required or important. Default: important.

sort_order.description: Deterministic sort order within the scope. Lower comes first. Default: 0.

notes.description: Optional notes for why this document is included.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_add_dependency
tools.description: Add a dependency between tasks. Rejects if it would create a cycle.

tools.name: mcp_den_analyze_image
tools.description: Convenience wrapper over the vision.analyze_image.v1 capability. Accepts an image reference (file path, artifact URL, or Den artifact ref) and returns a structured result. Rejects raw base64 and data: URL image input. Returns stable structured errors when the vision executor is missing or disabled.

image_ref.description: Image reference (file path, artifact URL, or Den artifact ref). Data: URLs and raw base64 strings are rejected.

question.description: Question or prompt for the vision model.

mode.description: Analysis mode: general, ui_screenshot, diagram, ocr, error_screen, diff. Default: general.

include_ocr.description: Whether to include OCR text extraction.

verbose.description: Include full invocation record in response.

tools.name: mcp_den_append_checkpoint
tools.description: Append a checkpoint packet for an assignment. Core-owned; checkpoints are the primary progress/completion/failure communication from workers. Gateway/Channels consume these via checkpoint response mechanisms.

run_id.description: Worker run id.

checkpoint_type.description: Checkpoint type: checkpoint, progress, completion, failure, state_snapshot.

tools.name: mcp_den_append_topic_clip
tools.description: Append a conversation clip to the topic clipping queue for later curation. Topic tags are validated against the registry.

source_agent.description: Agent identity that produced this clip.

topic_tags.description: Array of topic tags to assign. Aliases resolve to canonical slugs; unknown tags are rejected by default.

allow_inactive.description: If true, allow inactive/deprecated topics to pass validation.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_archive_document_preflight
tools.description: Check whether a document can be safely archived. Returns active references (agent guidance entries) that would be affected. Prefer running this before update_document_visibility to archived.

tools.name: mcp_den_archive_space
tools.description: Convenience method to archive a space (set visibility to 'archived'). Preserves all data but removes space from default listing. Reversible via update_space_visibility.

tools.name: mcp_den_claim_topic_clip_batch
tools.description: Claim a batch of pending topic clips for curation.

claim_ttl_minutes.description: Claim TTL in minutes. Defaults to 60.

tools.name: mcp_den_cleanup_blackboard_entries
tools.description: Delete expired cross-project shared blackboard entries and return the number removed.

tools.name: mcp_den_cleanup_topic_clip_raw_content
tools.description: Redact raw content for processed clips older than a cutoff. Preserves metadata and audit trail.

cutoff.description: Cutoff datetime (ISO 8601). Items updated before this with terminal status are redacted.

tools.name: mcp_den_cleanup_worker_run
tools.description: Idempotently cleanup a terminal tracked Den worker run and report cleanup lifecycle state.

run_id.description: Worker run id, or session id as fallback.

task_id.description: Optional task id to narrow run lookup.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_comment_on_document
tools.description: Add a comment to a document's default discussion thread. If no default thread exists, one is auto-created. For replying to an existing comment, use parent_comment_id. Use get_document_discussion (not get_document) to see comments — discussion is separate from document content.

author_identity.description: Author identity string (e.g. agent name or username).

parent_comment_id.description: Parent comment ID for replies. Omit for root-level comments.

comment_kind.description: Comment kind: comment, question, answer, resolution, version_note. Default: comment.

mentions.description: JSON array of mentioned identities. Accepts native JSON or JSON-encoded string.

source_refs.description: JSON array of source references. Accepts native JSON or JSON-encoded string.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_complete_topic_clips
tools.description: Mark topic clips as processed with an audit decision.

clip_ids.description: Array of clip IDs to complete.

tools.name: mcp_den_create_discussion_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an existing discussion thread by thread ID. For document-level comments, consider using comment_on_document instead. Use parent_comment_id to reply to an existing comment.

author_identity.description: Author identity string (e.g. agent name or username).

parent_comment_id.description: Parent comment ID for replies. Omit for root-level comments.

comment_kind.description: Comment kind: comment, question, answer, resolution, version_note. Default: comment.

mentions.description: JSON array of mentioned identities. Accepts native JSON or JSON-encoded string.

source_refs.description: JSON array of source references. Accepts native JSON or JSON-encoded string.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_create_orchestrator_lease
tools.description: Create a project-duration orchestrator lease. Selects an available pool member matching the profile/capability filter and assigns them as a temporary orchestrator for the specified project/channel/task/workstream scope. Distinct from bounded task-scoped worker assignments — represents pooled orchestrator residency.

project_id.description: Project ID for the orchestrator lease.

scope_type.description: Scope type: project, channel, task, or workstream. Default: project.

channel_id.description: Optional channel ID for channel-scoped leases.

task_id.description: Optional task ID for task-scoped engagement.

requested_duration_seconds.description: Requested duration in seconds. Null = indefinite.

renewal_policy.description: Renewal policy: allow, deny, auto. Default: deny.

drain_policy.description: Drain policy: graceful, immediate. Default: graceful.

required_capabilities.description: Optional JSON array of required capabilities.

run_id.description: Optional run id for correlation.

tools.name: mcp_den_create_project
tools.description: Register a new project for task management, messaging, and document storage.

id.description: Unique project ID slug, e.g. 'my-project'. Typically the directory name.

root_path.description: Absolute path to the project root on disk.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_create_review_finding
tools.description: Create a structured finding for a review round.

created_by.description: Agent or reviewer creating the finding.

file_references.description: Optional JSON array of file refs such as ["src/Foo.cs:42"].

test_commands.description: Optional JSON array of test commands relevant to the finding.

run_id.description: Optional sub-agent run ID for audit traceability.

subagent_role.description: Optional sub-agent role for identity validation (e.g. 'reviewer'). When provided, created_by must follow the '<agent>-<role>' convention.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_create_review_round
tools.description: Create a review round for a task with explicit branch and commit metadata.

branch.description: Head branch under review, e.g. task/544-fix-review-loop.

base_branch.description: Base branch for the intended diff, e.g. main or task/543-parent.

base_commit.description: Base commit SHA for the review diff.

last_reviewed_head_commit.description: Optional last reviewed head SHA. Defaults to the previous round's head when omitted.

commits_since_last_review.description: Optional number of commits since the last review round.

tests_run.description: Optional JSON array of test commands run by the implementer.

notes.description: Optional scope notes or rereview notes.

preferred_diff_base_ref.description: Optional preferred diff base ref for stacked reviews, e.g. task/543-parent. Defaults to base_branch.

preferred_diff_base_commit.description: Optional preferred diff base commit. Defaults to base_commit.

preferred_diff_head_ref.description: Optional preferred diff head ref. Defaults to branch.

preferred_diff_head_commit.description: Optional preferred diff head commit. Defaults to head_commit.

alternate_diff_base_ref.description: Optional alternate/global diff base ref, e.g. main.

alternate_diff_head_ref.description: Optional alternate/global diff head ref. Defaults to branch when alternate diff is provided.

alternate_diff_head_commit.description: Optional alternate/global diff head commit. Defaults to head_commit when alternate diff is provided.

delta_base_commit.description: Optional explicit delta base commit. Defaults to last_reviewed_head_commit or the previous round's head.

inherited_commit_count.description: Optional count of inherited commits from unmerged parent work.

task_local_commit_count.description: Optional count of task-local commits on top of inherited work.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_create_space
tools.description: Create a new space. Can be any kind (project, personal, assistant, knowledge_base, system).

kind.description: Space kind: project, personal, assistant, knowledge_base, system. Defaults to project.

visibility.description: Visibility: normal, hidden, archived. Defaults to normal.

root_path.description: Absolute path to the project root on disk (meaningful mainly for project kind).

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_create_task
tools.description: Create a new task or subtask in a project.

tags.description: JSON array of string tags, e.g. ["core","api"]. Accepts a native JSON array or a JSON-encoded string for backward compatibility.

assigned_to.description: Agent identity to assign this task to.

depends_on.description: Comma-separated task IDs this task depends on.

parent_id.description: Parent task ID to create this as a subtask.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_create_topic
tools.description: Create a new consolidation topic in the registry.

slug.description: Unique slug for the topic. Used as the canonical tag.

description.description: Optional description of what this topic covers.

aliases.description: Optional array of alias tags that resolve to this topic.

status.description: Status: active, inactive, deprecated. Defaults to active.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_delete_agent_guidance_entry
tools.description: Delete a first-class agent guidance entry by project or space scope and ID.

project_id.description: Guidance scope project or space ID that owns the entry. Use '_global' for global guidance entries.

tools.name: mcp_den_delete_blackboard_entry
tools.description: Delete a cross-project shared blackboard entry by slug.

tools.name: mcp_den_delete_document
tools.description: Delete a document by project or space ID and slug.

tools.name: mcp_den_delete_space
tools.description: ADMIN: Permanently delete a space and all its data. Refuses to delete system, personal, and core project spaces. Reports dependent records before deletion. Use archive_space or update_space_visibility as the non-destructive alternative.

force.description: Bypass protection for system/personal/core project spaces. Use with extreme caution.

tools.name: mcp_den_delete_topic
tools.description: Delete a consolidation topic by id.

tools.name: mcp_den_detect_orphaned_worker_runs
tools.description: Retired: Core no longer owns worker runtime/session launch state. Use den-host/runtime substrate diagnostics for orphaned launch detection.

stale_threshold_minutes.description: Deprecated. Runtime launch staleness is no longer tracked by Core.

tools.name: mcp_den_determine_orchestrator_next_action
tools.description: Evaluate Den task, worker completion packets, and real review state to pick the next fail-closed orchestrator action.

max_attempts.description: Maximum coder/reviewer retry attempts before escalation. Default 3.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_discard_topic_clips
tools.description: Mark topic clips as discarded with an audit decision.

clip_ids.description: Array of clip IDs to discard.

tools.name: mcp_den_escalate_topic_clips
tools.description: Mark topic clips as escalated with an audit decision.

clip_ids.description: Array of clip IDs to escalate.

tools.name: mcp_den_force_terminate_orphan_run
tools.description: Retired: Core no longer force-terminates runtime sessions. Expire durable assignments or terminate external runtime sessions in den-host.

session_id.description: Deprecated runtime session id. Core no longer owns runtime sessions.

terminated_by.description: Actor requesting termination (e.g. 'runner', admin agent name).

tools.name: mcp_den_get_agent_guidance
tools.description: Resolve the Den-native agent guidance packet for a project or space, combining _global and space-scoped guidance entries in deterministic order.

project_id.description: Project or space ID to resolve guidance for.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_agent_stream_entry
tools.description: Get a single agent stream entry by id, optionally scoped to a project.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_assignment
tools.description: Get a single assignment by id or run id. Returns denormalized profile_identity, worker_role, agent_instance_id for display.

run_id.description: Run id (mutually exclusive with assignment_id).

verbose.description: If true, return full record.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_blackboard_entry
tools.description: Get a cross-project shared blackboard entry by slug. Access refreshes idle TTL.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_capability
tools.description: Get a single capability definition by its capability_id. Returns full record including endpoint configuration, schemas, model config, and metadata.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_discussion_thread
tools.description: Get a single discussion thread by ID, optionally including its comments. Returns thread metadata and, when include_comments=true, all comments in chronological order.

include_comments.description: If true, include full comment list.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_document
tools.description: Get a document's full content by project or space ID and slug. Returns documents regardless of visibility (normal, hidden, archived). Concise by default with content preview; use verbose=true for full content.

verbose.description: If true, return full document content. Default is concise with content preview.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_document_discussion
tools.description: Get discussion threads and comments for a document. Discussion is separate from document content — use get_document for canonical document JSON without discussion fields. When create_if_missing=false (default) and no default thread exists, returns an empty result. Set create_if_missing=true to auto-create a default thread. Use include_resolved=true to include resolved/archived threads.

create_if_missing.description: If true, auto-create a default discussion thread if none exists.

include_resolved.description: If true, include resolved and archived threads in results.

anchor.description: Optional anchor to filter threads by.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_latest_task_packet
tools.description: Get the latest task-thread packet by packet metadata type/role. Returns the exact message reference for worker launch.

packet_type.description: Optional packet type, e.g. coder_context_packet or reviewer_context_packet.

role.description: Optional packet role, e.g. coder or reviewer.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_latest_worker_completion
tools.description: Get the latest structured completion packet for a worker run/task/role, or report missing_packet when none exists.

run_id.description: Optional worker run id.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_messages
tools.description: Get messages in a project, with optional filters. Returns newest first. Concise by default with content previews; use verbose=true for full message bodies.

task_id.description: Filter to messages on a specific task.

since.description: ISO datetime — only messages after this time.

unread_for.description: Agent identity — only unread messages for this agent.

limit.description: Max messages to return. Default 20, max 100.

verbose.description: If true, return full message bodies. Default is concise with content previews.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_no_capacity_request
tools.description: Get a single worker pool no-capacity request record by id. Includes the typed reason code, candidate statistics, original request parameters, and diagnostic message explaining why a lease could not be fulfilled.

verbose.description: If true, return full record.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_orchestrator_lease
tools.description: Get a single orchestrator lease by internal id or lease_id. Returns full lease details including scope, objective, binding evidence, and expiry.

id.description: Internal lease id (mutually exclusive with lease_id).

lease_id.description: Unique lease id (mutually exclusive with id).

verbose.description: If true, return full record.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_pool_residency_projection
tools.description: Get the pool residency projection for a project — lists all active residencies (task-worker assignments, orchestrator leases, gateway bindings) to distinguish between: joined channel member, live binding, leased orchestrator, dedicated agent, and bounded role-worker assignment.

project_id.description: Project ID to get residency projection for.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_project
tools.description: Get a project by ID with summary stats (task counts by status, unread messages).

agent.description: Your agent identity, for unread message count.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_space
tools.description: Get a space by ID with summary stats (task counts by status, unread messages).

agent.description: Your agent identity, for unread message count.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_task
tools.description: Get full task details including dependencies, subtasks, and recent messages. Concise by default with bounded recent messages and descriptions; use verbose=true for full detail.

verbose.description: If true, return full detail including full description and recent messages. Default is concise.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_task_workflow_summary
tools.description: Get a compact task workflow summary for orchestrator startup/drain. Returns task status, current review state, latest packet headers (without full bodies), unresolved findings/actions, and links/message IDs. Use get_task for full detail. Use verbose=true for full record.

verbose.description: If true, return full record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_thread
tools.description: Get a complete message thread — the root message plus all replies in chronological order. Concise by default with content previews; use verbose=true for full message bodies.

verbose.description: If true, return full message bodies. Default is concise with content previews.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_topic
tools.description: Get a consolidation topic by slug.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_user_notifications
tools.description: Get the canonical user notification feed. Returns notifications across projects, newest first, with optional filters for project, task, sender, metadata type, urgency, and read state. Each notification includes id, project_id, task_id, sender, content, metadata, urgency, is_read, and created_at. Concise by default with content previews; use verbose=true for full content.

project_id.description: Filter to a specific project/space ID. Omit for cross-project listing.

task_id.description: Filter to a specific task ID.

urgency.description: Filter by urgency: low, normal, or high.

is_read.description: Filter by read state. Must provide read_for_agent when set.

read_for_agent.description: Agent identity for read-state derivation. Required when is_read is set.

verbose.description: If true, return full notification content. Default is concise with content previews.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_worker_pool_summary
tools.description: Get a bounded summary projection of the worker pool: member counts by status, active/completed/failed assignment counts, and recent checkpoint activity. Suitable for Agents Overview and caretaker reads.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_worker_run
tools.description: Get a tracked Den worker run by run id or session id. Concise by default; use verbose=true for full projection including launch metadata.

run_id.description: Worker run id, or session id as fallback.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record including launch metadata. Default is concise.

tools.name: mcp_den_get_worker_run_status
tools.description: Get a tracked Den worker run status projection combining assignment state and latest completion-packet state. Concise by default; use verbose=true for full detail.

run_id.description: Worker run id, or session id as fallback.

task_id.description: Optional task id to narrow completion lookup.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record. Default is concise.

tools.name: mcp_den_invoke_capability
tools.description: Invoke a capability by its capability_id. Core records the invocation in the audit log and proxies the call for read-only http_endpoint capabilities. Non-read-only capabilities are rejected with a clear error. Always produces a terminal audit record regardless of outcome.

verbose.description: Include full invocation record in response.

tools.name: mcp_den_lease_worker
tools.description: Lease an available worker from the pool for a project/task/role. Returns the assignment record with denormalized pool member identity fields on success. On failure, returns a typed no-capacity diagnostic with reason code, candidate statistics, and next-allowed guidance. Core-owned — Gateway/Channels use this to dispatch work. Lifecycle operations key on worker_identity (concrete member id). Use role/worker_role as the primary worker selector — do not pass role names as capabilities. Use profile_identity to filter by shared role profile when multiple members share it.

role.description: Worker role: coder, reviewer, validator, drift_checker, packet_auditor.

run_id.description: Worker run id for this assignment.

profile_identity.description: Optional profile identity filter (e.g. 'spawned-coder'). Only workers with this profile are considered.

worker_role.description: Optional worker role filter (e.g. 'coder'). Only workers with this role are considered.

required_capabilities.description: JSON array of hard capability constraints, e.g. ["dotnet","sqlite"]. Do NOT pass role names (coder/reviewer/validator) here — use role/worker_role instead. Role-name aliases are normalised and matched against worker_role automatically.

verbose.description: If true, return full assignment record.

tools.name: mcp_den_legacy_approve_dispatch
tools.description: LEGACY / ADMIN ONLY: RETIRED: Dispatch approval is no longer supported. Dispatch is a retired legacy primitive per den-communication-surfaces-concept-map.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_legacy_complete_dispatch
tools.description: LEGACY / ADMIN ONLY: RETIRED: Dispatch completion is no longer supported. Dispatch is a retired legacy primitive per den-communication-surfaces-concept-map.

completed_by.description: Identity of who completed (e.g. the agent identity).

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_legacy_get_dispatch
tools.description: LEGACY / ADMIN ONLY: Get a dispatch entry by ID with full details including generated prompt. Dispatch is a retired legacy primitive; this tool remains only for archive inspection.

tools.name: mcp_den_legacy_list_dispatches
tools.description: LEGACY / ADMIN ONLY: List dispatch entries with optional filters. Returns newest first. Dispatch is a retired legacy primitive; this tool remains only for archive inspection.

tools.name: mcp_den_legacy_publish_reviewed_branch
tools.description: LEGACY / ADMIN ONLY: Trusted publisher Mode B: let an allowed Hermes orchestrator publish or fast-forward reviewed work after Den review checks pass. Publisher-path-only.

requested_by.description: Allowed trusted orchestrator identity requesting publish/merge.

expected_base_branch.description: Expected target/base branch. Defaults to main.

review_round_id.description: Den review round id with looks_good verdict.

remote_name.description: Optional remote name. Defaults to origin.

expected_remote_url.description: Optional expected canonical remote URL. If omitted, the project root origin URL is used.

reviewed_git_bundle_path.description: Optional absolute path to a reviewed git bundle staged under configured trusted artifact roots. Used only when the reviewed branch is unavailable from the canonical remote.

validate_only.description: If true, perform all validation and audit but do not push.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_legacy_publish_worker_branch
tools.description: LEGACY / ADMIN ONLY: Trusted publisher Mode A: publish a verified Pi worker branch without exposing Git credentials to the worker sandbox. Publisher-path-only.

run_id.description: Worker run id, or session id as fallback.

expected_branch.description: Expected safe task-scoped branch, e.g. task/1285-trusted-publisher.

role.description: Expected worker role. Defaults to coder.

expected_base_commit.description: Optional expected base commit/ref for changed-file scope validation. Defaults to completion packet base_commit or origin/main.

remote_name.description: Optional remote name. Defaults to origin.

expected_remote_url.description: Optional expected canonical remote URL. If omitted, the project root origin URL is used.

validate_only.description: If true, perform all validation and audit but do not push.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_legacy_reject_dispatch
tools.description: LEGACY / ADMIN ONLY: RETIRED: Dispatch rejection is no longer supported. Dispatch is a retired legacy primitive per den-communication-surfaces-concept-map.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_legacy_request_den_publish_dry_run
tools.description: LEGACY / ADMIN ONLY: Den-native facade for den-publish validate-only promotion dry-run. Builds the camelCase den-publish payload from explicit Den/code-gate fields, verifies matching looks_good review state, calls den-publish, and records the result in the task thread. Publisher-path-only.

worker_run_id.description: Worker run id that produced the submission.

canonical_remote_url.description: Canonical remote URL expected by policy.

review_round_id.description: Den review round id that must have looks_good verdict for the same head.

code_gate_instance.description: Optional code-gate instance label. Defaults to den-code-gate.

role.description: Optional submission role. Defaults to coder.

parent_submission_id.description: Optional parent submission id for rework chains.

convenience_ref.description: Optional mutable convenience ref; authority remains ingress_ref.

changed_files_claim.description: Optional JSON array or comma-separated changed-file claim.

allowed_path_prefixes.description: Optional JSON array or comma-separated allowed changed-path prefixes.

tests_run.description: Optional JSON array or newline-separated tests run.

scope_overrides.description: Optional JSON array of structured overrides: [{override_id, finding_ids, reason, approved_by}].

orchestrator_override.description: Optional JSON object for trusted-orchestrator soft-failure policy, e.g. {unclassified_failure_policy, reason, expected_risk_categories}.

decision_id.description: Optional decision id. Defaults to pub_<task_id>_<submission_id>.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_active_agents
tools.description: List agents currently active on a project (or all projects). Shows who else is working, useful for coordination.

project_id.description: Project ID to filter by. Omit to see all active agents.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_agent_guidance_entries
tools.description: List first-class agent guidance entries for a project or space. Use include_global to also show inherited _global entries.

project_id.description: Project or space ID whose entries should be listed.

include_global.description: Whether to include _global entries inherited by the project.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_agent_instance_bindings
tools.description: List agent instance bindings used for role-aware delivery resolution. Defaults to active/degraded bindings.

project_id.description: Project ID to filter by. Omit to see all projects.

status.description: Filter by binding statuses (comma-separated): active,inactive,degraded. Defaults to active,degraded.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_agent_stream
tools.description: List agent stream entries with optional global or project-scoped filters. Returns newest first.

project_id.description: Optional project filter. Omit for the global stream.

stream_kind.description: Filter by stream kind: ops or message.

event_type.description: Optional event type filter, e.g. review_requested or question.

metadata_run_id.description: Optional metadata run_id filter for sub-agent run events.

include_debug.description: Include debug-level sub-agent work events (subagent_work_* or event_visibility=debug). Default false returns summary/attention events only.

limit.description: Maximum entries to return. Default 50, max 200.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_assignments
tools.description: List worker assignments with optional project/task/worker/state/role filters. Use this for caretaker reads and overview projection. Assignment records include denormalized profile_identity, worker_role, agent_instance_id for display.

state.description: Optional state filter: ack, running, checkpoint_waiting, blocked, completed, failed, expired.

verbose.description: If true, return full assignment records.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_blackboard_entries
tools.description: List cross-project shared blackboard entry summaries. Listing refreshes idle TTL for returned expiring entries.

tags.description: Filter by tags (comma-separated). Entry must have ALL specified tags.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_capabilities
tools.description: List registered capability definitions with optional status/side-effect-level/project filtering. Capabilities represent external services or executors that can be invoked through Core.

status.description: Optional status filter: experimental, active, degraded, disabled.

side_effect_level.description: Optional side-effect level filter: read_only, notification_only, bounded_write, external_write.

verbose.description: Include full definition details.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_curation_decisions
tools.description: List curation decisions (audit trail).

tools.name: mcp_den_list_discussion_threads
tools.description: List discussion threads across targets. Currently supports document-target threads only; omit target_type or set target_type=document. Filter by target_project_id, target_slug, or status. Default limit is 50.

target_type.description: Target type filter. Currently only 'document' is supported. Omit to search all document threads.

target_project_id.description: Project or space ID to filter by.

status.description: Filter by thread status: open, resolved, archived.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_documents
tools.description: List document summaries (without content). Excludes archived documents by default. Omit project_id to list across all projects and spaces. Concise by default; use verbose=true for full document records.

project_id.description: Project or space ID. Omit to list across all projects and spaces.

doc_type.description: Filter by type: prd, spec, adr, convention, reference, note, memory.

tags.description: Filter by tags (comma-separated). Document must have ALL specified tags.

visibility.description: Filter by visibility: normal, hidden, archived. Omit to exclude archived documents.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records. Default is concise with deep_read_hint.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_no_capacity_requests
tools.description: List worker pool no-capacity request records — typed diagnostics for lease attempts that could not be fulfilled. Each record includes the typed reason code, candidate statistics by status, the original request parameters, and a diagnostic message. Reason codes: no_matching_worker, all_busy, all_quarantined_or_offline, ambiguous, preferred_not_found_or_busy, hard_selector_mismatch. Use this for readback, automation, and Den Web diagnostics.

run_id.description: Optional run id filter.

reason_code.description: Optional reason code filter (no_matching_worker, all_busy, all_quarantined_or_offline, ambiguous, preferred_not_found_or_busy, hard_selector_mismatch).

verbose.description: If true, return full records.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_orchestrator_leases
tools.description: List project-duration orchestrator leases with optional project/scope/state/identity filtering. By default excludes terminal leases; use include_terminal=true to see all.

include_terminal.description: Include terminal leases (released, quarantined, expired, degraded).

tools.name: mcp_den_list_pool_members
tools.description: List worker pool members with optional status/profile/role/capability filtering. For Agents Overview/caretaker reads of pool health. Filter by profile_identity to find all members sharing a role profile (e.g. all spawned-coder instances).

status.description: Optional status filter: available, busy, quarantined, offboarded.

verbose.description: If true, return full member records.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_projects
tools.description: List registered projects. Defaults to normal project-kind spaces only, excluding hidden or archived spaces.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_review_findings
tools.description: List review findings for a task or a specific review round. Concise by default; use verbose=true for full finding records.

status.description: Optional statuses (comma-separated): open, claimed_fixed, verified_fixed, not_fixed, superseded, split_to_follow_up.

resolved.description: Optional resolved filter. True = resolved/history, false = unresolved only.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records. Default is concise.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_review_rounds
tools.description: List review rounds for a task in chronological order. Concise by default; use verbose=true for full round records.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records. Default is concise.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_spaces
tools.description: List spaces with optional kind and visibility filters.

kind.description: Filter by space kind (project, personal, assistant, knowledge_base, system). Omit to include all kinds.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks in a project with optional filters. Returns summaries without descriptions. Concise by default; use verbose=true for full task records.

tags.description: Filter by tags (comma-separated). Task must have ALL specified tags.

priority.description: Filter: tasks at this priority or higher (lower number = higher priority).

parent_id.description: Filter by parent task ID to list subtasks. Omit for top-level tasks.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records. Default is concise.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_topic_clips
tools.description: List topic clip queue items.

status.description: Filter by status: pending, claimed, processed, discarded, escalated.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_topics
tools.description: List consolidation topics. Defaults to active topics only.

tools.name: mcp_den_list_worker_runs
tools.description: List tracked Den worker runs with optional filters. Concise by default; use verbose=true for full worker run projections including launch metadata.

limit.description: Maximum entries to return. Default 50, max 200.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_mark_notifications_read
tools.description:
Mark user notifications as read for an agent identity. Supports two modes:
1) Explicit IDs: pass notification_ids (comma-separated).
2) Scoped mark-all: pass mark_all="true" with scope_project_id (required) and optional scope_task_id.
The two modes are mutually exclusive. Only marks messages with intent='notification'.

agent.description: Agent identity to mark read for.

notification_ids.description: Comma-separated notification IDs to mark as read.

mark_all.description: Set to "true" to mark all notifications in scope as read.

scope_project_id.description: Project ID for mark-all scope. Required when mark_all is true.

scope_task_id.description: Optional task ID to narrow mark-all scope to a specific task.

tools.name: mcp_den_mark_read
tools.description: Mark messages as read for an agent.

message_ids.description: Comma-separated message IDs to mark as read.

tools.name: mcp_den_next_task
tools.description: Get the next unblocked task to work on. Checks subtasks of in-progress parents first, then top-level planned tasks. Ranks by priority, then fewer dependencies, then lower ID. Concise by default; use verbose=true for full task record.

assigned_to.description: Optionally filter to tasks assigned to this agent.

verbose.description: If true, return full task record. Default is concise.

tools.name: mcp_den_post_review_findings
tools.description: Post a standardized reviewer findings packet for a review round back to the task thread.

sender.description: Agent or user posting the findings packet.

thread_id.description: Optional task-thread message to reply to.

notes.description: Optional summary note to append to the packet.

run_id.description: Optional sub-agent run ID for audit traceability.

subagent_role.description: Optional sub-agent role for identity validation (e.g. 'reviewer'). When provided, sender must follow the '<agent>-<role>' convention.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_post_worker_completion_packet
tools.description: Post an idempotent structured Den worker completion packet and update the durable worker/session status.

run_id.description: Worker run id, or session id as fallback.

status.description: Completion status: completed, blocked, failed, needs_input, or incomplete. Invalid values are recorded as malformed.

packet_type.description: Packet type: implementation_packet, review_findings_packet, validation_packet, drift_check_packet, packet_audit_packet, or worker_failure_packet.

summary.description: Safe human-readable summary. Must not contain secrets.

head_commit.description: Optional head commit reported by worker.

base_commit.description: Optional base commit expected by orchestrator.

tests_run.description: Optional JSON array of test commands/results.

finding_ids.description: Optional JSON array of review finding ids.

failure_category.description: Optional failure category for non-success statuses.

recovery_guidance.description: Optional recovery guidance for failed/blocked/incomplete work.

dedupe_key.description: Optional idempotency key for retry-safe completion posting.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_prepare_coder_context_packet
tools.description: Create and store a bounded Den task-thread coder context packet for a tracked Den worker. Launch workers by referencing the returned message id, not by passing the packet body in process args.

notes.description: Optional additional instructions to include in the packet.

completion_reporting_mode.description: Completion reporting mode: worker_mcp_tool or artifact_reconciled. Default worker_mcp_tool.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_prepare_drift_checker_context_packet
tools.description: Create and store a bounded Den task-thread drift-checker context packet for comparing task intent, packet claims, diff, and review state.

head_commit.description: Optional head commit under drift check.

notes.description: Optional additional instructions to include in the packet.

completion_reporting_mode.description: Completion reporting mode: worker_mcp_tool or artifact_reconciled. Default worker_mcp_tool.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_prepare_packet_auditor_context_packet
tools.description: Create and store a bounded Den task-thread packet-auditor context packet for checking worker packet claims against Den and repo state.

head_commit.description: Optional head commit under packet audit.

notes.description: Optional additional instructions to include in the packet.

completion_reporting_mode.description: Completion reporting mode: worker_mcp_tool or artifact_reconciled. Default worker_mcp_tool.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_prepare_reviewer_context_packet
tools.description: Create and store a bounded Den task-thread reviewer context packet for a tracked Den worker. Launch workers by referencing the returned message id, not by passing the packet body in process args.

notes.description: Optional additional instructions to include in the packet.

completion_reporting_mode.description: Completion reporting mode: worker_mcp_tool or artifact_reconciled. Default worker_mcp_tool.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_prepare_validator_context_packet
tools.description: Create and store a bounded Den task-thread validator context packet for a deterministic tracked Den worker.

notes.description: Optional additional instructions to include in the packet.

completion_reporting_mode.description: Completion reporting mode: worker_mcp_tool or artifact_reconciled. Default worker_mcp_tool.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_quarantine_pool_member
tools.description: Quarantine a worker pool member by concrete worker_identity. Sets status to quarantined and records who quarantined them and why. This prevents the worker from receiving new leases. Uses concrete worker_identity — one quarantined member does not affect other members sharing the same profile_identity.

worker_identity.description: Worker identity to quarantine (concrete member id).

tools.name: mcp_den_query_archived_documents
tools.description: Deliberate archived document recall path. List or search documents that have been archived. Separate from default list_documents to prevent accidental inclusion of archived content.

query.description: Optional FTS5 search query. Omit to list all archived documents.

project_id.description: Scope to one project or space.

doc_type.description: Filter by type: prd, spec, adr, convention, reference, note, memory.

tools.name: mcp_den_query_librarian
tools.description: Ask the librarian for context relevant to your current work. Returns relevant tasks, documents, and messages with source attribution and recommendations. Best used at the start of a task or when you need background on a topic. Works with any space ID (project, personal, assistant, knowledge_base, etc.).

project_id.description: Project or space ID to search within.

query.description: What you're working on or looking for, e.g. 'I'm starting work on task 47 — implementing FTS5 search'.

task_id.description: Task ID to enrich search with task context (dependencies, messages, tags).

include_global.description: Whether to also search _global project documents. Default: true.

tools.name: mcp_den_reconcile_stale_orchestrator_leases
tools.description: Reconcile stale orchestrator leases — expire leases past their expiry time, degrade leases whose pool member heartbeat is stale. Returns count of affected leases. Does not permanently busy the shared profile.

tools.name: mcp_den_record_cleanup_evidence
tools.description: Record cleanup evidence for a terminal assignment. Required before release. The assignment must be in a terminal state (completed, failed, or expired).

tools.name: mcp_den_register_worker_run
tools.description: Register a tracked Den worker run before an external/local substrate posts completion packets.

role.description: Worker role: coder, reviewer, validator, drift_checker, or packet_auditor.

substrate.description: Runtime substrate label supplied by the external worker launcher. Core records assignments but does not launch substrates.

run_id.description: Optional explicit worker run id. Omit to allocate one.

session_id.description: Deprecated runtime correlation id. Accepted for compatibility but not stored by Core.

workspace_id.description: Deprecated workspace id. Accepted for compatibility but not stored by Core.

profile.description: Optional Hermes profile name. Do not pass secrets or profile contents.

provider.description: Optional provider name. Do not pass API keys.

workdir.description: Optional working directory for the worker process.

prompt_packet_message_id.description: Optional Den task-thread prompt packet message id.

dedupe_key.description: Optional idempotency key. When supplied, session identity is derived from it for retry-safe registration.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record including launch metadata. Default is concise.

tools.name: mcp_den_release_assignment
tools.description: Release a terminal assignment with cleanup evidence. Only succeeds when the assignment is in a terminal state AND cleanup evidence has been recorded.

tools.name: mcp_den_remove_dependency
tools.description: Remove a dependency between tasks.

tools.name: mcp_den_render_worker_prompt
tools.description: Render a small worker startup prompt that points at a Den packet message reference without embedding the packet body in process args.

completion_reporting_mode.description: Completion reporting mode: worker_mcp_tool or artifact_reconciled. Default worker_mcp_tool.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_request_review
tools.description: Create a review round and post a standardized review request or rereview packet to the task thread.

branch.description: Head branch under review, e.g. task/597-review-packet-ux.

base_branch.description: Base branch for the intended diff, e.g. main or task/596-parent.

base_commit.description: Base commit SHA for the review diff.

last_reviewed_head_commit.description: Optional last reviewed head SHA. Defaults to the previous round's head when omitted.

commits_since_last_review.description: Optional number of commits since the last review round.

tests_run.description: Optional JSON array of test commands run by the implementer.

notes.description: Optional scope notes or rereview notes.

preferred_diff_base_ref.description: Optional preferred diff base ref for stacked reviews, e.g. task/596-parent. Defaults to base_branch.

preferred_diff_base_commit.description: Optional preferred diff base commit. Defaults to base_commit.

preferred_diff_head_ref.description: Optional preferred diff head ref. Defaults to branch.

preferred_diff_head_commit.description: Optional preferred diff head commit. Defaults to head_commit.

alternate_diff_base_ref.description: Optional alternate/global diff base ref, e.g. main.

alternate_diff_head_ref.description: Optional alternate/global diff head ref. Defaults to branch when alternate diff is provided.

alternate_diff_head_commit.description: Optional alternate/global diff head commit. Defaults to head_commit when alternate diff is provided.

delta_base_commit.description: Optional explicit delta base commit. Defaults to last_reviewed_head_commit or the previous round's head.

inherited_commit_count.description: Optional count of inherited commits from unmerged parent work.

task_local_commit_count.description: Optional count of task-local commits on top of inherited work.

thread_id.description: Optional task-thread message to reply to.

run_id.description: Optional sub-agent run ID for audit traceability.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_rerun_worker_run
tools.description: Rerun a tracked Den worker using the stored launch profile where available.

run_id.description: Worker run id, or session id as fallback.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_respond_to_checkpoint
tools.description: Respond to a checkpoint with guidance/redirect/abort signals. Core-owned; responses are the primary orchestrator-to-worker communication mechanism. An 'ack' response transitions the assignment back to running. An 'abort' response transitions the assignment to expired.

run_id.description: Worker run id.

response_type.description: Response type: ack, guidance, redirect, abort, checkpoint_request.

assignment_id.description: Optional assignment id for automatic assignment state transitions.

tools.name: mcp_den_respond_to_review_finding
tools.description: Add implementer response notes to a review finding and optionally mark it claimed_fixed or otherwise update status. response_notes record the implementer response; status_notes record evidence for the status transition. Use follow_up_task_id only with split_to_follow_up.

responded_by.description: Agent or user responding to the finding.

response_notes.description: Optional implementer response notes; stored separately from reviewer/status verification notes.

status.description: Optional status update: open, claimed_fixed, verified_fixed, not_fixed, superseded, split_to_follow_up.

status_notes.description: Optional notes explaining this status transition; use for current verification/status evidence.

follow_up_task_id.description: Optional follow-up task ID. Required for split_to_follow_up and rejected for all other statuses.

run_id.description: Optional sub-agent run ID for audit traceability.

subagent_role.description: Optional sub-agent role for identity validation (e.g. 'reviewer'). When provided, responded_by must follow the '<agent>-<role>' convention.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_search_documents
tools.description: Full-text search across documents. Excludes archived documents. Supports AND, OR, NOT, and "phrase" queries. Concise by default with snippets; use verbose=true for full results.

project_id.description: Scope search to one project or space.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON records. Default is concise with deep_read_hint.

tools.name: mcp_den_send_agent_stream_message
tools.description: Append a targeted agent-stream message entry for clarification or nudge flows. Use this for question, answer, note, or nudge entries; detailed work context should stay in task-thread messages.

sender.description: Sender identity, e.g. user, pi, or another manual agent identity.

event_type.description: Message subtype: question, answer, note, or nudge.

project_id.description: Optional project scope. Required for recipient_role routing unless recipient_instance_id is provided.

recipient_role.description: Optional target role within a project.

delivery_mode.description: Optional delivery mode: record_only, notify, or wake. Defaults to record_only for note and notify otherwise.

metadata.description: Optional JSON metadata object or JSON-encoded string.

dedup_key.description: Optional dedup key for retry-safe appends.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_send_message
tools.description: Send a message in a project. Can be project-level, attached to a task, or a reply in a thread.

sender.description: Your agent identity, e.g. 'pi' or another manual agent identity.

task_id.description: Attach to a task by ID.

thread_id.description: Reply to an existing message (forms a thread).

metadata.description: Optional JSON metadata object or JSON-encoded string, e.g. {"type":"review_request"}.

intent.description: Optional canonical intent, e.g. review_feedback or handoff.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_send_user_notification
tools.description: Send a user-facing notification message in a project. Use this when you have noteworthy information for the user that should not require stopping the run or waiting for a final response. Examples: server needs redeployment, a long-running task completed, a blocking issue needs user decision. Notifications appear prominently in the Den Desktop Messages tab.Prefer this over send_message when the message is specifically for the user rather than general task tracking.

sender.description: Your agent identity, e.g. 'pi' or another manual agent identity.

content.description: Notification body (markdown). Keep it concise and actionable.

task_id.description: Attach to a task by ID.

metadata.description: Optional JSON metadata object or JSON-encoded string.

urgency.description: Optional urgency hint: low, normal, or high. Defaults to normal.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_set_review_finding_status
tools.description: Update the status for a review finding. Notes are status/verification evidence and do not replace implementer response_notes. Use follow_up_task_id only with split_to_follow_up; non-split status transitions clear any old follow-up link.

status.description: New status: open, claimed_fixed, verified_fixed, not_fixed, superseded, split_to_follow_up.

updated_by.description: Agent or user updating the finding status.

notes.description: Optional status/verification notes for this transition.

follow_up_task_id.description: Optional follow-up task ID. Required for split_to_follow_up and rejected for all other statuses.

run_id.description: Optional sub-agent run ID for audit traceability.

subagent_role.description: Optional sub-agent role for identity validation (e.g. 'reviewer'). When provided, updated_by must follow the '<agent>-<role>' convention.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_set_review_verdict
tools.description: Set the verdict for a review round.

decided_by.description: Agent or user setting the verdict.

run_id.description: Optional sub-agent run ID for audit traceability.

subagent_role.description: Optional sub-agent role for identity validation (e.g. 'reviewer'). When provided, decided_by must follow the '<agent>-<role>' convention.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_split_review_findings_to_follow_up
tools.description: Split selected non-blocking review findings into a follow-up task. Creates a follow-up task with generated description and marks each finding split_to_follow_up. Blocking findings are skipped unless override_blocking=true.

task_id.description: Task ID that owns the review findings.

finding_ids.description: JSON array of review finding IDs to split.

split_by.description: Agent or user performing the split.

follow_up_title.description: Optional title for the follow-up task. Default: auto-generated.

follow_up_parent_task_id.description: Optional parent task ID for the follow-up task.

follow_up_priority.description: Priority for the follow-up task (1-5). Default: 3.

follow_up_assigned_to.description: Optional agent identity to assign the follow-up task to.

follow_up_tags.description: Optional JSON array of string tags for the follow-up task. Accepts a native JSON array or a JSON-encoded string for backward compatibility.

override_blocking.description: If true, include blocking findings in the split. Default: false.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_store_blackboard_entry
tools.description: Create or update a cross-project shared blackboard Markdown entry. Entries are not scoped to a project.

tags.description: JSON array of string tags. Accepts a native JSON array or a JSON-encoded string for backward compatibility.

idle_ttl_seconds.description: Optional idle TTL in seconds. If set, the entry expires when not accessed for this many seconds.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_store_document
tools.description: Create or update a document. If a document with the same project_id + slug exists, it is overwritten.

project_id.description: Project or space ID. Use '_global' for cross-project docs.

slug.description: Unique slug within the project, e.g. 'damage-system-spec'.

doc_type.description: Document type: prd, spec, adr, convention, reference, note, memory. Default: spec.

tags.description: JSON array of string tags. Accepts a native JSON array or a JSON-encoded string for backward compatibility.

summary.description: Optional short summary for indexing and listing.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_transition_orchestrator_lease
tools.description: Transition an orchestrator lease to a new state. Valid states: proposed, leased, active, checkpoint_waiting, draining, released, quarantined, expired, degraded. Terminal transitions release the pool member back to available.

evidence.description: Optional cleanup evidence JSON for terminal transitions.

tools.name: mcp_den_update_discussion_thread
tools.description: Update a discussion thread's status, summary, resolution_summary, or title. Common use: mark threads as resolved or archived after discussion concludes.

status.description: New status: open, resolved, archived. Omit to leave unchanged.

resolution_summary.description: Optional resolution summary. Typically set when status=resolved.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_update_document_visibility
tools.description: Update a document's visibility to normal, hidden, or archived. Archiving is a status flip — not data movement. Use archive_document_preflight first to check for active references.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_update_project
tools.description: Update mutable metadata fields for an existing project. Only fields explicitly provided (non-null) are changed; all other fields are left as-is. Safe — will not overwrite existing data with blanks.

root_path.description: New absolute root path on disk (optional). Set to empty string to clear.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_update_space_visibility
tools.description: Update a space's visibility (normal, hidden, archived). The preferred green path for removing spaces from normal lists without data loss. Archived spaces are preserved but excluded from default list views.

visibility.description: New visibility value: normal, hidden, archived.

tools.name: mcp_den_update_task
tools.description: Update a task's fields. Records changes in audit history. When setting status to 'blocked', blocker_summary and blocker_reason are required.

agent.description: Your agent identity (required for audit trail).

status.description: New status: planned, in_progress, review, blocked, done, cancelled.

tags.description: JSON array of string tags. Accepts a native JSON array or a JSON-encoded string for backward compatibility.

blocker_summary.description: Required when status=blocked. Short blocker summary.

blocker_reason.description: Required when status=blocked. Why the agent cannot proceed.

blocker_attempted_remedies.description: Optional when status=blocked. Remedies or evidence of what was attempted.

blocker_suggested_next_step.description: Optional when status=blocked. Suggested next decision or unblock path.

blocker_requires_human_input.description: Optional when status=blocked. Whether human input is required vs planner can replan. Default: false.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_update_topic
tools.description: Update a consolidation topic by id.

verbose.description: If true, return full JSON record instead of concise summary.

tools.name: mcp_den_upsert_capability_definition
tools.description: Register or update a capability definition. Capabilities represent external service executors that can be discovered and invoked through Core. Core only proxies read-only (side_effect_level='read_only') HTTP endpoint capabilities.

description.description: Optional description of what this capability does.

owner_project_id.description: Optional project that owns this capability.

implementation_kind.description: Implementation kind: http_endpoint, core_builtin, registry_only. Default: registry_only.

service_endpoint.description: Service endpoint URL for http_endpoint implementation kind.

http_method.description: HTTP method for the endpoint (default: POST).

input_schema_ref.description: Reference to an input schema definition.

output_schema_ref.description: Reference to an output schema definition.

input_schema_json.description: Inline JSON schema for request validation.

output_schema_json.description: Inline JSON schema for response validation.

side_effect_level.description: Side-effect level: read_only, notification_only, bounded_write, external_write. Default: read_only.

status.description: Status: experimental, active, degraded, disabled. Default: experimental.

fallback_models_json.description: Fallback model configurations as JSON array.

max_request_bytes.description: Maximum request body size in bytes (default: 10485760).

tools.name: mcp_den_upsert_pool_member
tools.description: Register or update a worker pool member. Workers are tracked agents that can accept assignment leases for project/task/role work. Multiple members can share the same profile_identity (e.g. 'spawned-coder') but each has a distinct worker_identity for concrete lifecycle tracking.

worker_identity.description: Unique worker identity (e.g. spawned-Hermes agent id / concrete member id).

profile_identity.description: Shared role/profile identity (e.g. 'spawned-coder'). Multiple members can share this.

worker_role.description: Worker role: coder, reviewer, validator, drift_checker, packet_auditor.

capabilities.description: JSON array of capability strings, e.g. ["dotnet","sqlite"]. Do NOT use role names (coder/reviewer/validator) as capability strings; those are resolved through worker_role.

status.description: Pool status: available, busy, quarantined, offboarded. Default: available.

channel_id.description: Optional Den channel id for correlation.

metadata.description: Optional JSON metadata (provider, model, toolsets, etc.).

tools.name: mcp_den_validate_topic_tags
